results.name: no_track_overlap_track_split
results.description: Under the track guard, no track id appears in more than one split (row-level too).

results.name: assert_no_track_overlap_fires_on_leak
results.description: The overlap assertion fails loud when a track straddles splits.

results.name: every_split_has_all_ten_genres
results.description: Stratification gives coverage = 1.0: every split holds all 10 genres.

results.name: stratified_counts_exact_for_n100
results.description: For 100 tracks/genre the per-genre split is exactly 70/15/15.

results.name: track_counts_sum_back
results.description: Rounded splits sum back to the stratum size; train absorbs the remainder.

results.name: different_seed_changes_assignment
results.description: A different seed changes the assignment (it is actually randomized).

results.name: naive_random_straddles_tracks
results.description: The whole point of keeping naive_random: on segment-level shuffling many

results.name: bad_ratios_raise
results.description: Ratios that don't sum to 1.0 (or wrong length) are rejected.

results.name: artist_split_is_explicit_notimplemented
results.description: artist_split fails explicitly (no GTZAN artist metadata) rather than splitting wrong.

results.name: write_split_to_manifest
results.description: The split records seed/ratios/sizes into manifest.json, preserving existing keys.
